meta.title: Cyber Ethics: Where Do You Stand?
meta.description:
Tommy Gardner has been teaching a one-semster course on cyber ethics at Catholic University. Here you get the 30-minute cram course.

As the technology in the cyber field advances at a rapid pace how is the progression of our collective ethical standards keeping up? What are the questions in the field that we need to deal with? What is the framework we use to determine the answers?  Tommy's session provokes self inspection and thought on where you and your company or agency stands on the issue.
